Container.Name: AppFlowy-Admin
Container.Overview: Step 6/7: AppFlowy Admin Frontend — the web-based admin console for managing users, workspaces, and settings. Accessible at /console via the nginx proxy. Part of the AppFlowy Cloud stack.
Container.Requires: Custom Docker network named "appflowy" must exist before deploying any container in this stack. Create it via SSH or the Unraid terminal: docker network create appflowy — Network Type is pre-set to "appflowy" by default, verify it is selected.
Container.Description:
AppFlowy Admin Frontend — a Next.js web application for server administration. Accessible through AppFlowy-Nginx at http://YOUR_SERVER_IP/console. Use the GoTrue admin credentials to log in.

Deploy order: (1) AppFlowy-Postgres → (2) AppFlowy-Redis → (3) AppFlowy-MinIO → (4) AppFlowy-GoTrue → (5) AppFlowy-Cloud → (6) AppFlowy-Admin, AppFlowy-Web, AppFlowy-Worker, AppFlowy-Search → (7) AppFlowy-Nginx

Config.Name: GoTrue Base URL
Config.Description: Internal URL of the AppFlowy-GoTrue container.

Config.Name: AppFlowy Cloud Base URL
Config.Description: Internal URL of the AppFlowy-Cloud container.
